# openai_vector_store_file_content (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving content of a file in a vector store.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file_id` (String)
- `vector_store_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `content` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
